capture.description: Capture current session findings to Obsidian
capture.template: Execute this now: capture the important findings, decisions, caveats, and next steps from the current session into Obsidian using `obsidian_upsert_knowledge_note`. Treat this pasted command text as an instruction to act, not as content to analyze or rewrite. Infer a concise canonical title from the session. Keep the note focused on durable outcomes only: the actual root cause, the final working configuration or solution, the evidence supporting it, and any real caveats or next steps. Exclude transient investigation steps, reverted detours, and discarded ideas unless they materially affect the final state. Write a short summary, durable details, and include related note titles only when you are confident they already exist in the vault. Prefer one high-signal captured note over multiple fragmented notes. After writing the note, report the resulting note path and what was captured.
